description: As a licensed structural engineer at Caldwell & Associates, format the field notes from /home/ga/Documents/inspection_draft.docx into a professional report saved to /home/ga/Documents/inspection_report.docx. The report must use Heading 1 for primary sections (Introduction, Scope of Assessment, Building Description, Structural Observations, Structural Calculations, Conclusions and Recommendations, Professional Engineer Certification) and Heading 2 for subsections, following a multi-level numbered outline. Format the seven structural deficiency observations into individual 3-column tables (Location, Deficiency Description, Recommended Action) with bold headers and visible borders, each preceded by a bold label (e.g., 'OBS-001 (Critical):'). Reformat the three load calculations into 4-column tables (Parameter, Value, Unit, Code Reference) with bold headers and visible borders. Apply figure captions to the five figures. The Professional Engineer Certification section must feature a bordered single-cell table containing the certification text, license number TX-78234, and the statement: 'I hereby certify that this structural assessment was prepared by me or under my direct supervision'.
